archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with a touch of 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
emotional_tone: Cinematic, elegant, minimal, modern, immersive, technically sophisticated, gallery-like drama.

sizes.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl (for hero massive text, fluid typography clamp)

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32 (Generous Spacing Philosophy)
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetrical Broken Grid (Tetris Grid). Use 12-column layouts with elements spanning uneven columns to create tension. Heavy use of negative space.
spacing_and_layout.section_transitions: Fullscreen sections with smooth scrolling (Lenis is MANDATORY). Minimal clutter.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Avoid standard cards. Use large unbordered image regions or 1px subtle borders (border-neutral-800) for tech stack.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling using Lenis to give the site weight and premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom cursor glow dot (small, smooth). Subtle hover expansion on interactive elements. NO laggy trailing cursor or giant circles. Keep it minimal.

animations.entrance: Fade-up reveals, staggered content animation (using Framer Motion).
animations.hover: Image zoom on hover (scale-105 with long transition duration 0.6s ease-out), magnetic hover for buttons, text masking transitions.
animations.parallax: Soft parallax movement for large images and background elements.

motion_and_interactions.avoid: Excessive motion, flashy effects, unnecessary particles.

surfaces_and_effects.glassmorphism: For sticky nav only. bg-[#050505]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5.
surfaces_and_effects.cards: For Tech Stack: Flat background, 1px subtle border, glowing hover state via radial gradient mouse tracking (tracing beam effect).

images.description: Abstract cinematic background for the Hero section, overlay with bg-black/60 to keep text readable.
Developer profile photo for the About section.
Premium 3D render UI mockup for React E-commerce App.
Modern architecture for Travel Agency Dashboard context.
High-end UI mockup for Online Learning Center.
Minimalist dark notebook for Todo Task List project.
Floating smartphone on dark background for Phone E-commerce.
Glowing dusk architecture for Property Hub.

component_instructions.Hero: Cinematic fullscreen. Use 'hero_bg' as absolute background with motion.div slow scale (parallax). Large 'ZAEEM AFZAL' in Clash Display. Subtle Electric Blue accents.
component_instructions.Projects: Case study grid (1 or 2 per row). Use huge images with dark overlays that clear on hover. Image zoom on hover. Titles should be H2/H3 in Clash Display.
component_instructions.Tech Stack: Interactive grid (bento-style). Floating icons using Framer Motion. 1px solid border (#2A2A2A) with inner glow on hover.
component_instructions.Contact: Minimal form using Shadcn inputs but stripped of default borders, styled with border-b only or subtle dark fields.
component_instructions.Navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism, minimal (Logo + 3 links + Let's Talk CTA).

testing.attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='project-card-react-ecommerce'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for fade-ups, staggering, and the custom cursor.
Install and setup Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Design with pure HTML + Tailwind for major layout sections to maintain the broken grid/asymmetrical look.
Forms can use Shadcn but must match the dark matte cinematic theme (no white borders).
Integrate the provided user choices: LinkedIn, GitHub, Email, and Project Links.
MongoDB + Resend for Contact Form as requested.
